title: wedelia ehrenbergii var. veronicifolia
intro: Wedelia ehrenbergii var. veronicifolia, also known as Wedelia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Wedelia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Wedelia is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including skin infections and wounds.
